<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Sojourner — News That Follows People</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;0,900;1,400;1,700&family=Source+Serif+4:ital,opsz,wght@0,8..60,300;0,8..60,400;0,8..60,600;1,8..60,300;1,8..60,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --navy: #1a2355;
    --navy-deep: #0f1635;
    --navy-mid: #243070;
    --orange: #f5a623;
    --orange-light: #ffbe55;
    --orange-pale: #fff8ec;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #fafaf8;
    --gray-light: #f2f0ec;
    --gray-mid: #b8b5ae;
    --gray-dark: #6b6860;
    --text: #1c1b18;
    --text-soft: #4a4845;
    --border: #e8e5de;
  }
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: var(--white); color: var(--text); overflow-x: hidden; }

  /* ── NAVIGATION ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
    background: var(--white);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 0 3rem; height: 68px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 12px rgba(26,35,85,0.06);
  }
  .nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; }
  .nav-logo img { height: 40px; width: auto; }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--text-soft); text-decoration: none;
    font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    transition: color 0.2s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover, .nav-links a.active { color: var(--navy); }
  .nav-cta {
    background: var(--navy) !important; color: var(--white) !important;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: 600 !important;
    transition: background 0.2s !important;
  }
  .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--navy-mid) !important; }

  /* ── PAGE SYSTEM ── */
  .page { display: none; padding-top: 68px; min-height: 100vh; }
  .page.active { display: block; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    background: var(--white);
    padding: 5rem 3rem 4.5rem;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
    color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .hero-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 28px; height: 2px; background: var(--orange); }
  .hero h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    color: var(--navy-deep); font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 4.5vw, 3.8rem);
    line-height: 1.12; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
    letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  }
  .hero h1 em { color: var(--orange); font-style: italic; }
  .hero-desc {
    color: var(--text-soft); font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
    font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn-primary {
    background: var(--navy); color: var(--white);
    padding: 0.8rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 3px;
    font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--navy-mid); transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .btn-outline {
    background: transparent; color: var(--navy);
    padding: 0.78rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 3px;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; border: 2px solid var(--navy); cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s; display: inline-block;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover { background: var(--navy); color: var(--white); }

  /* Hero card */
  .hero-card {
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    background: var(--white);
  }
  .hero-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(26,35,85,0.1); }
  .hero-card-img {
    width: 100%; height: 200px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-deep) 0%, var(--navy-mid) 100%);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900;
    color: var(--orange); text-align: center; line-height: 1.2;
  }
  .hero-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; }
  .hero-card-tag { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .hero-card-title { color: var(--navy-deep); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .hero-card-meta { color: var(--gray-dark); font-size: 0.75rem; }

  /* ── TICKER ── */
  .ticker-bar {
    background: var(--navy-deep); padding: 0.6rem 3rem;
    display: flex; gap: 2.5rem; overflow: hidden; align-items: center;
  }
  .ticker-label { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--orange); letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }
  .ticker-item { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); white-space: nowrap; }
  .ticker-divider { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-size: 0.7rem; }

  /* ── SECTION COMMON ── */
  .section { padding: 4rem 3rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-wrapper { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .section-label {
    color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .section-label::before { content: ''; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--orange); }
  .section-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2rem); font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy-deep); line-height: 1.2; }

  /* ── FEATURED GRID ── */
  .featured-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 2.5rem; }
  .article-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  }
  .article-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(26,35,85,0.09); border-color: #ccc; }
  .card-img {
    width: 100%; height: 160px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 900;
  }
  .card-img.feature { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy-deep), var(--navy-mid)); color: var(--orange); }
  .card-img.news { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2d1b6e, #1a0d4a); color: #c4b5fd; }
  .card-img.editorial { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c2d12, #431407); color: var(--orange-light); }
  .card-img.culture { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #064e3b, #022c22); color: #6ee7b7; }
  .card-img.opinion { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a5f, #0c1f35); color: #93c5fd; }
  .card-img.campus { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4a1d96, #2e1065); color: #f0abfc; }
  .card-body { padding: 1.25rem; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  .card-category { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; color: var(--navy-deep); }
  .card-excerpt { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-soft); line-height: 1.6; flex: 1; }
  .card-meta { margin-top: 1rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }
  .card-author { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--gray-dark); font-weight: 500; }
  .card-date { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--gray-mid); }

  /* ── ABOUT STRIP ── */
  .about-strip {
    background: var(--navy-deep); color: var(--white);
    padding: 4rem 3rem;
  }
  .about-strip-inner { max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; }
  .about-strip h2 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 900; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; line-height: 1.2; }
  .about-strip h2 span { color: var(--orange); }
  .about-strip p { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; font-size: 1rem; }

  /* ── CATEGORY TABS ── */
  .cat-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .cat-tab {
    padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 2px;
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    border: 2px solid var(--border); background: transparent; cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.15s; color: var(--text-soft);
  }
  .cat-tab.active, .cat-tab:hover { border-color: var(--orange); color: var(--orange); background: var(--orange-pale); }

  /* ── ARTICLE VIEW ── */
  .article-page { max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 3rem 2rem 5rem; }
  .article-back {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--navy); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: 2rem;
    border: none; background: none;
  }
  .article-back:hover { color: var(--orange); }
  .article-category { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  .article-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 4vw, 2.8rem); font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.12; color: var(--navy-deep); margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .article-meta {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1.5rem; border-bottom: 3px solid var(--orange);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .article-meta-author { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--navy); }
  .article-meta-date { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--gray-dark); }
  .article-meta-dot { width: 4px; height: 4px; background: var(--orange); border-radius: 50%; }
  .article-header-img {
    width: 100%; height: 300px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 900;
  }
  .article-body { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.85; color: var(--text); }
  .article-body p { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .article-body blockquote {
    border-left: 4px solid var(--orange); margin: 2rem 0;
    padding: 1rem 1.5rem; background: var(--orange-pale);
    font-style: italic; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--navy);
  }
  .article-body h3 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 2rem 0 1rem; color: var(--navy-deep); }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .contact-page { max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 4rem 2rem; }
  .contact-page h1 { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 2.4rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--navy-deep); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .contact-page h1 span { color: var(--orange); }
  .contact-page .tagline { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; color: var(--text-soft); font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 3rem; line-height: 1.6; }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
  .contact-card {
    background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 1.5rem; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
    transition: transform 0.15s, border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;
  }
  .contact-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--orange); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(245,166,35,0.12); }
  .contact-card-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .contact-card-label { font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--orange); margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .contact-card-value { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--navy-deep); }
  .contact-email-section { background: var(--navy-deep); border-radius: 6px; padding: 2rem; text-align: center; }
  .contact-email-section p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .contact-email-section a { color: var(--orange); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; }
  .contact-email-section a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: var(--navy-deep); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
    padding: 3rem; border-top: 3px solid var(--orange);
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem;
  }
  footer h4 { color: var(--white); font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
  footer p { font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.65; }
  footer ul { list-style: none; }
  footer ul li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  footer ul li a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.82rem; transition: color 0.15s; }
  footer ul li a:hover { color: var(--orange); }
  .footer-logo img { height: 36px; width: auto; filter: brightness(0) invert(1); margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
  .footer-tagline { color: var(--orange); font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; }
  .footer-bottom {
    background: var(--navy-deep); padding: 1.25rem 3rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  }
  .footer-bottom p { font-size: 0.72rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }

  /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
  @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  .page.active .animate-in { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.12s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.19s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.26s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.33s; }
  .animate-in:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.40s; }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    .hero-featured { display: none; }
    .featured-grid, .works-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    nav { padding: 0 1.5rem; }
    .section { padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    footer { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
    .about-strip { padding: 3rem 1.5rem; }
    .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .featured-grid, .works-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .nav-links a:not(.nav-cta) { display: none; }
  }
</style><nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#" onclick="showPage('home')">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sojourner" style="height:40px;width:auto;">
  </a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('home')" id="nav-home" class="active">Home</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('works')" id="nav-works">Works</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')" id="nav-contact">Contact</a>
    <a href="#" onclick="showPage('contact')" class="nav-cta">Get in Touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>
